prompt: Create module room_entrance_01, the dungeon entrance gate room. It must show a shabby rookie Demon King cave-castle entrance with a clear walkable stone floor and an iron/stone gate motif near the back edge. Socket rule: ONLY the NE socket and SE socket are open two-cell-wide doorways; NW and SW sides are sealed with stone wall, cave rock, columns, and rubble. Keep the center floor open for units to run through.
scene: One standalone 2D quarter-view isometric-like dungeon module on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for later alpha extraction.
subject: Cute horror fantasy dungeon room module, no characters.
style: Readable hand-painted cartoon game asset, fixed 2:1 quarter-view angle, no horizon, no vanishing point.
composition: Single centered 6x6 logical-cell module footprint with padding; front wall cut low so units will not be hidden; socket openings visually align to module edges.
lighting: Dark cave dungeon mood with purple magical torch light and small warm accents.
palette: Dark stone, charcoal, muted violet, small gold or orange highlights; do not use #00ff00 inside the asset.
materials: Cracked cave stone floor, rough walls, iron gate, torch fixtures, rubble, columns.
constraints: Background must be one uniform #00ff00 with no shadow, gradient, texture, floor plane, reflection, or lighting variation.
